title: Restore module declaration compatibility in resolver

source.subject: fix: restore module declaration compatibility in resolver and semantics

body:
Restores **module declaration** compatibility in resolver and semantic analysis after file-scoped module changes.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`3c754d3`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/3c754d3)
- **Subject:** fix: restore module declaration compatibility in resolver and semantics
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`

## Relation
Late v0.1 hardening before v0.2 platform-spec alignment.
